story.iWant: automated CI/CD pipelines configured for frontend and backend
story.soThat: code changes are automatically tested, validated, and deployed to appropriate environments

tasks.task: Verify GitHub Actions Workflows - Verify frontend and backend workflows exist, review configurations, verify trigger conditions, update if needed
Configure Vercel Integration - Install Vercel CLI, create project, configure environment variables, enable auto-deployment, configure branch deployments
Configure Railway/Render Integration - Create account/project, link repository, configure service settings, set environment variables, enable auto-deployment
Configure GitHub Secrets - Add Vercel tokens/IDs, Railway tokens/IDs, database URLs, Supabase keys, JWT secrets, Gemini API key
Configure Database Migration Automation - Review migration workflow, verify commands, test execution, document rollback procedure
Add Security Scanning - Add npm audit steps to workflows, configure security scanning
Verify Pipeline Execution - Test frontend and backend pipelines, verify all stages, verify deployment and health checks
Create CI/CD Documentation - Document deployment process, environment variables, rollback procedures, troubleshooting

acceptanceCriteria.ac: GitHub Actions Workflows Configured - Frontend and backend workflows exist with lint, build, test, deploy stages, trigger on main/staging/develop branches and PRs
Vercel Integration (Frontend) - Project created and linked, environment variables configured for dev/preview/staging/production, auto-deployment enabled
Railway/Render Integration (Backend) - Project created and linked, environment variables configured, auto-deployment enabled, health check endpoint configured
CI/CD Pipeline Stages - Lint & Type Check, Build, Test, Security scanning, Deploy, Health Check
Secrets Management - GitHub Secrets configured for Vercel, Railway, database URLs, Supabase keys, JWT secrets, Gemini API key, secrets not exposed in logs
Database Migration Strategy - Automated migrations run before deployment, rollback plan documented, test migrations validated before staging/production
Pipeline Execution Verification - All stages execute successfully, tests run automatically, deployment occurs, health checks verify success

docs.doc: Story acceptance criteria and technical notes for CI/CD pipeline setup including GitHub Actions workflows, Vercel integration, Railway/Render integration, secrets management, and database migration strategy.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Foundation & Core Infrastructure

docs.doc: Technical specification for CI/CD pipeline setup including deployment targets, integration points, and acceptance criteria. Specifies Vercel for frontend, Railway/Render for backend, and GitHub Actions for CI/CD.

doc.title: Miners Hub - Deployment and CI/CD Strategy

docs.doc: Comprehensive deployment and CI/CD strategy document covering frontend and backend pipeline stages, platform-specific configurations, environment strategy, secrets management, and deployment procedures.
Architecture patterns and component structure relevant to CI/CD setup, including deployment targets, environment configuration, and integration patterns.
Previous story that created GitHub Actions workflows. Workflows already exist at .github/workflows/frontend-ci-cd.yml and backend-ci-cd.yml with test integration configured.

artifact.reason: Existing frontend CI/CD workflow with lint, build, test, and deploy stages. Needs verification and potential enhancement for security scanning.
Existing backend CI/CD workflow with lint, build, test, migration, and deploy stages. Needs verification and potential enhancement for security scanning.
Health check endpoint at /api/health used for post-deployment verification. Returns status, timestamp, environment, and database connection status.
Backend entry point with health check endpoint registration. Shows global prefix 'api' and health check URL.
Migration commands available: migration:generate, migration:create, migration:run, migration:revert, migration:show. Used in CI/CD for database migrations.
Frontend build and test scripts used in CI/CD pipeline: build, test:unit, test:integration, test:e2e, test:coverage.

constraints.constraint: GitHub Actions workflows already exist from Story 1.11 - verify and enhance rather than recreate
Three-environment approach required: dev, staging, production
Frontend deploys to Vercel, backend deploys to Railway/Render
Database migrations must run before backend deployment
Health check endpoint at /api/health must be verified post-deployment
Secrets must be stored in GitHub Secrets and never exposed in logs
Test frameworks from Story 1.11 are already integrated - reuse existing test commands
Coverage reporting via Codecov already configured - maintain existing integration

interfaces.interface: Returns health status with database connection status. Used for post-deployment verification in CI/CD pipelines.
GitHub Action for deploying to Vercel. Requires VERCEL_TOKEN, VERCEL_ORG_ID, and VERCEL_PROJECT_ID secrets.
GitHub Action for deploying to Railway. Requires RAILWAY_TOKEN and RAILWAY_SERVICE_ID secrets.
Migration commands: migration:generate, migration:create, migration:run, migration:revert, migration:show. Used in CI/CD for database schema updates.

tests.standards: Testing standards from Story 1.11: Frontend uses Vitest (unit/integration) and Playwright (E2E). Backend uses Jest (unit/integration/E2E) and Supertest (API testing). Test coverage thresholds: Frontend 70%, Backend 80%. Tests are already integrated into CI/CD workflows and run automatically on commits. Coverage reports are uploaded to Codecov.
tests.locations: Frontend tests: __tests__/unit/, __tests__/integration/, tests/e2e/, tests/component/ Backend tests: src/**/*.spec.ts (unit), test/integration/ (integration), test/*.e2e-spec.ts (E2E)

ideas.test: Verify GitHub Actions workflows execute successfully with test commits
Test Vercel deployment with preview, staging, and production environments
Test Railway/Render deployment with staging and production environments
Verify security scanning (npm audit) runs in both workflows
Verify GitHub Secrets are accessible but not exposed in logs
Test database migration execution in CI/CD pipeline
Verify health check endpoint responds correctly after deployment
